title: Adrenaline: Dawnlight Edition
description: A high-performance Fabric modpack built on Adrenaline/Additive's optimizations, with Fresh Animations for vibrant mob/player movements and a curated Iris shader selection—defaulting to no-shader "True Sight" for maximum speed on any hardware.
body:
# Credits & Disclaimer

This modpack is a personal curation built on top of the performance-focused foundation provided by the **Adrenaline** modpack concept (a highly optimized collection of Fabric mods aimed at improving rendering, game logic, memory usage, and overall FPS). Many modern optimized packs (such as Additive) are kept in sync with Adrenaline's core improvements.

- **Additive (kept in sync with Adrenaline)**: https://modrinth.com/modpack/additive

I am **not affiliated** with the original Adrenaline creators, any mod developers, resource pack authors, or shader creators. I simply combined, configured, and tested these components to work well together, with a focus on smooth performance and enhanced animations. Full credit goes to the original developers and artists — please support them by downloading from their official pages!

### Core Performance & Utility Mods
Most of these are standard Fabric optimization and quality-of-life mods. The majority can be found on Modrinth:

- Sodium — https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium
- Iris (shader support) — https://modrinth.com/mod/iris
- Lithium — https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium
- Distant Horizons — https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons
- Entity Culling, ImmediatelyFast, FerriteCore, Krypton, Dynamic FPS, and many others are also included for maximum performance.

All other mods in the list (e.g., Entity Model Features, Entity Texture Features, Player Animation Lib, NotEnoughAnimations, Better Animations Collection, etc.) are available on Modrinth — simply search for them there.

### Animation Enhancements (Resource Packs)
Animations are added via carefully selected and compatible resource packs, loaded in the correct order for best results:

- Fresh Animations (creature animation overhaul) → https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations
- Foliage+ (improved foliage, vegetation, and realism) → https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/foliage+
- Fresh Moves (enhanced player animations with animated eyes) → https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tras-fresh-player
- Bare Bones (base texture pack for clean, vibrant visuals — many shaders are built around it) → https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones

### Shader Selection
A variety of Iris-compatible shaders are included to suit different hardware levels, from low-end to high-end. By default, **True Sight** (no shader) is enabled for the snappiest performance and maximum compatibility.

Available options include:
- Potato Shaders (ultra-lightweight) → https://modrinth.com/shader/potato-shaders
- Builder's QOL Shaders (vanilla+ enhancement) → https://modrinth.com/shader/builders-qol-shaders
- Bloop Shaders (fast with good visuals) → https://modrinth.com/shader/bloop-shaders
- Bliss Shaders (fantasy-styled, highly customizable) → https://modrinth.com/shader/bliss-shader
- Various BareBones-compatible lighting packs, SLITE, Body Camera, Night Vision variants, and retro options.

Some shaders/resource packs may originate from CurseForge or direct author pages — check in-game or the pack files for exact sources.

Thank you to all the amazing creators in the Minecraft modding community for making these incredible tools! This pack is designed to be fast, beautiful, and animated while staying playable on a wide range of systems. Enjoy! 🚀
